queries.question: what themes are available for each summer camp?
queries.sql: SELECT Themes.themeName  from Summer_Camp_Themes join Themes on Summer_Camp_Themes.themeId = Themes.id join Summer_Camps on Summer_Camp_Themes.summerCampId = Summer_Camps.id   GROUP BY Summer_Camp_Themes.themeId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Summer_Camp_Themes.summerCampId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Summer_Camps)

queries.question: what themes are available for each summer camp?
queries.sql: select summer_camps.campname , themes.themename from Summer_Camp_Themes join Themes on Summer_Camp_Themes.themeId = Themes.id join Summer_Camps on Summer_Camp_Themes.summerCampId = Summer_Camps.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?campname ?themename WHERE {
  ?summer_camp_themes a :Summer_Camp_Themes .
  ?themes a :Themes .
  ?summer_camp_themes p:hasThemes ?themes .
  ?summer_camps a :Summer_Camps .
  ?summer_camp_themes p:hasSummer_Camps ?summer_camps .
  ?summer_camps p:campName ?campname .
  ?themes p:themeName ?themename .
}
